'''鈭歾-th-l''' ('''zathala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codeshare|codeshare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codeshare|codeshare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| zathala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zathalithi|zathalithi]] || [[word:zathaliji|zathaliji]] || [[word:zathalishi|zathalishi]] || [[word:zathali|zathali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathaluthuth|zathaluthuth]] || [[word:zathalujuj|zathalujuj]] || [[word:zathalushush|zathalushush]] || [[word:zathal|zathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathaluthu|zathaluthu]] || [[word:zathaluju|zathaluju]] || [[word:zathalushu|zathalushu]] || [[word:zathalu|zathalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathalufuth|zathalufuth]] || [[word:zathalufuj|zathalufuj]] || [[word:zathalufush|zathalufush]] || [[word:zathaluf|zathaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zathalethe|zathalethe]] || [[word:zathaleje|zathaleje]] || [[word:zathaleshe|zathaleshe]] || [[word:zathale|zathale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathalothoth|zathalothoth]] || [[word:zathalojoj|zathalojoj]] || [[word:zathaloshosh|zathaloshosh]] || [[word:zathal|zathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathalotho|zathalotho]] || [[word:zathalojo|zathalojo]] || [[word:zathalosho|zathalosho]] || [[word:zathalo|zathalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathalofoth|zathalofoth]] || [[word:zathalofoj|zathalofoj]] || [[word:zathalofosh|zathalofosh]] || [[word:zathalof|zathalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zathal忙th忙|zathal忙th忙]] || [[word:zathal忙j忙|zathal忙j忙]] || [[word:zathal忙sh忙|zathal忙sh忙]] || [[word:zathal忙|zathal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathalathath|zathalathath]] || [[word:zathalajaj|zathalajaj]] || [[word:zathalashash|zathalashash]] || [[word:zathal|zathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathalatha|zathalatha]] || [[word:zathalaja|zathalaja]] || [[word:zathalasha|zathalasha]] || [[word:zathala|zathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathalafath|zathalafath]] || [[word:zathalafaj|zathalafaj]] || [[word:zathalafash|zathalafash]] || [[word:zathalaf|zathalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zathalasha|zathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozathalasha|gozathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizathalasha|gokizathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zathaln眉sha|zathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozathalnkn眉sha|gozathalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizathaln眉sha|gokizathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zathalsh毛sha|zathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozathalnksh毛sha|gozathalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizathalsh毛sha|gokizathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zathalrosha|zathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozathalnkrosha|gozathalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizathalrosha|gokizathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zathalmusha|zathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathalnkmusha|gozathalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathalmusha|gokizathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zathalsherasha|zathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozathalnksherasha|gozathalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizathalsherasha|gokizathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zathalngasha|zathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozathalnkngasha|gozathalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizathalngasha|gokizathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zathalyasha|zathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozathalnkyasha|gozathalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizathalyasha|gokizathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zathalyamasha|zathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozathalnkyamasha|gozathalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizathalyamasha|gokizathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zathaln眉sh毛sha|zathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozathalnkn眉sh毛sha|gozathalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizathaln眉sh毛sha|gokizathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zathaln眉rosha|zathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozathalnkn眉rosha|gozathalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizathaln眉rosha|gokizathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathaln眉musha|zathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathalnkn眉musha|gozathalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathaln眉musha|gokizathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zathalsh毛n眉sha|zathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozathalnksh毛n眉sha|gozathalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizathalsh毛n眉sha|gokizathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zathalsh毛rosha|zathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozathalnksh毛rosha|gozathalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizathalsh毛rosha|gokizathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathalsh毛musha|zathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathalnksh毛musha|gozathalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathalsh毛musha|gokizathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zathalron眉sha|zathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozathalnkron眉sha|gozathalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizathalron眉sha|gokizathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zathalrosh毛sha|zathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozathalnkrosh毛sha|gozathalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizathalrosh毛sha|gokizathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathalromusha|zathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathalnkromusha|gozathalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathalromusha|gokizathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zathalmun眉sha|zathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozathalnkmun眉sha|gozathalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizathalmun眉sha|gokizathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zathalmush毛sha|zathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozathalnkmush毛sha|gozathalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizathalmush毛sha|gokizathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zathalmurosha|zathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozathalnkmurosha|gozathalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizathalmurosha|gokizathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zathal|zathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙th忙l|z忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozathal|hozathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙th忙l|hoz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozathal|hohozathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙th忙l|hohoz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zathal|n眉zathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙th忙l|n眉z忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zathal|n眉n眉zathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙th忙l|n眉n眉z忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zathal|n茂zathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙th忙l|n茂z忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zathal|n茂n茂zathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙th忙l|n茂n茂z忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzathal|luzathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙th忙l|luz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzathal|luluzathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙th忙l|luluz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizathal|lizathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙th忙l|liz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizathal|lilizathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙th忙l|liliz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozathal|kozathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙th忙l|koz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozathal|kokozathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙th忙l|kokoz忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezathal|kezathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙th忙l|kez忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezathal|kekezathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙th忙l|kekez忙th忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
